name: Akkra (Bean Fritters)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the beans overnight in cold water.
2. Drain and rinse thoroughly.
3. Put through a meat grinder with the finest blade or blend briefly in an electric blender.
4. Grind the peppers.
5. Add salt and ground peppers to the beans and mix until light and fluffy, increasing in volume.
6. Heat oil in a heavy frying pan.
7. Fry the mixture by tablespoonfuls until golden brown on both sides.
8. Drain on paper towels.
9. Serve hot as an accompaniment to drinks.
